callPrep.title: What to expect on the call
callPrep.unknownNumber: The call may show as Unknown or Private — that's us confirming your Skinouva order.
callPrep.whatWeAsk: We'll ask for your delivery address in the UAE and confirm your order details. Takes about 60 seconds.
callPrep.whyAnswer: Answering this call is what unlocks shipping. Most customers who answer receive their order within 2–4 days.
callPrep.ifMiss: If we can't reach you, your order may be cancelled to free stock for other customers.

about.headline: About Skinouva
about.body: Skinouva was created to offer a simple, elegant skincare experience for women in the UAE. Instead of crowded routines and confusing choices, we focus on carefully selected serums for clear concerns: dark spots, blemish marks, and uneven-looking tone.
about.missionBody: To offer UAE women a carefully selected serum for each skin concern, with a simple and trustworthy ordering experience.

contact.headline: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question about a product or your order? Send us a message and we will help you choose the right serum.
contact.success: Thank you! We will get back to you soon.

faq.title: Questions before you order
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before paying at the door.

items.q: Is the concentration on the label?
items.a: Yes. Dark-spot serum is 15% TXA + Niacinamide; acne-marks serum is 16% Azelaic — clear doses on the bottle, not vague claims.

items.q: Is cash on delivery available across the UAE?
items.a: Yes. COD (cash or card at the door) is available in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, RAK, Fujairah, and Al Ain. No online payment.
VIP cooled shipping in 24–48 hours for main cities, and 2–4 business days for other UAE areas.
Dark spots / uneven tone → 15% TXA. Acne marks / redness → 16% Azelaic. For strongest results, take the full AM/PM routine.

items.q: Can I use both serums together?
items.a: Yes. Many customers use TXA in the morning and Azelaic at night. Start gradually if your skin is sensitive.

items.q: Is it suitable for sensitive skin?
items.a: Formulated without artificial fragrance or drying alcohol. Very sensitive skin: start every other day, then daily.

items.q: When will I notice a difference?
items.a: Calmer feel and better texture in the first 7 days. Clearer spot/mark improvement from week two. End of first bottle = before/after comparison.
30-day satisfaction guarantee. Try the bottle. If you do not see a worthwhile difference — full refund, even if empty.

productItems.q: What is the difference between the two serums?
productItems.a: 15% TXA targets the look of dark spots and uneven tone. 16% Azelaic targets the look of acne marks, redness, and texture.
Standard vitamin C oxidizes quickly in Gulf heat. TXA and azelaic are more heat-stable and better suited to UAE conditions.

productItems.q: When will I see real results?
productItems.a: First 7 days: calm and texture. Week two: spots/marks start fading. End of month: clear difference in photos.
No artificial fragrance, no drying alcohol, no parabens. Active concentration is stated clearly.

shippingItems.a: Yes, 100%. Name and mobile only. Pay cash or card when the order arrives.
24–48 hours for main cities with cooled shipping. 2–4 days for other areas.

shippingItems.q: Can I edit or refuse the order?
shippingItems.a: Contact us before dispatch to edit name/number/address. At the door you can inspect before paying.

shippingItems.q: What if the product arrives damaged?
shippingItems.a: Send a photo immediately and we will handle replacement under our guarantee policy.

tranexamic.name: Tranexamic Acid
tranexamic.benefit: Helps support a more even, balanced-looking complexion.

niacinamide.name: Niacinamide (Vitamin B3)
niacinamide.benefit: Supports a clearer, smoother-looking skin appearance with regular use.

azelaic.name: Azelaic Acid
azelaic.benefit: Helps support a calmer-looking skin and reduce the appearance of blemish marks.

routine.title: How to Use
routine.morningSteps: Cleanse your skin. Apply the serum. Finish with a moisturiser. Don't forget SPF.
routine.eveningSteps: Cleanse your skin. Apply the serum. Finish with a suitable moisturiser.
routine.consistency: Realistic results require consistency. Use the serum as directed and look for gradual visible improvement over weeks, not exaggerated overnight promises.

pain.headline: We know exactly what you struggle with every day...
points: Having to wear layers of foundation and concealer just to hide dark spots.
Feeling insecure about appearing makeup-free in front of family and friends.
Stubborn blemish marks that refuse to fade no matter what creams you try.
The harsh UAE heat and humidity that trigger breakouts and uneven texture.
pain.solution: Skinouva was created to end this struggle, helping you return to your natural, confident self.

guarantee.headline: 30 days — or your money back. No questions.
guarantee.body: Try the first bottle fully. If you do not feel a difference worth it, contact us and we refund every dirham — even if the bottle is empty. If our formula did not work for you, we do not deserve your money.
guarantee.cta: Choose your serum — pay at the door

productCro.stat: 92% of UAE women suffer from stubborn pigmentation due to intense UV exposure and constant AC.
productCro.painSub: We don't just mask symptoms. We target the root cause — one ingredient for each pain point.

painQuotes.quote: "I spent thousands on laser sessions, and once summer hit, the dark spots came back even worse."
painQuotes.reason: 15% TXA + Niacinamide targets pigment at the source — without burning your barrier in UAE heat.

painQuotes.quote: "My skin gets so oily in Dubai humidity. My makeup melts in 2 hours, exposing all my red and dark marks."
painQuotes.reason: Light, fast-absorbing serum — calms skin and supports clearer-looking marks without heavy makeup layers.

painQuotes.quote: "I tried famous, expensive vitamin C serums. They were sticky and did absolutely nothing for my spots."
painQuotes.reason: 15% TXA + Niacinamide clearly labelled — clinical concentrations, not heat-oxidized vitamin C.

painQuotes.quote: "Every summer the spots come back stronger — and I cover them with foundation every single day."
painQuotes.reason: A simple daily routine built for Gulf sun and AC — gradual visible improvement from week two.

productCro.mechanismHeadline: The secret is treating the root, not burning the surface
productCro.mechanismBody: Our formulation does not rely on burning off your skin layers. We use clinical concentrations that penetrate safely to disrupt excess melanin production at its source. Needle-like results, without the needles and zero downtime.
productCro.timelineHeadline: What will you see in the first 30 days?
productCro.timelineSub: Your skin transforms week by week — and your friends will notice before you even say anything.

timeline.title: Hydration & Calmness
timeline.desc: Redness and inflammation subside. Your skin texture feels softer, and makeup glides on perfectly. The skin barrier begins to heal.

timeline.title: Pigment Breakdown
timeline.desc: Dark spots and stubborn acne marks begin to break apart and lighten. You'll notice your face looks 'well-rested' and glowing in the morning.

timeline.title: The Visible Difference
timeline.desc: Now you can compare before & after photos. Uneven tone is drastically reduced, and you'll confidently go out makeup-free. (The 2nd box locks in these results).

productCro.compareSub: Everything you’ve tried… and why it failed in UAE heat.
productCro.noNastiesHeadline: What you won’t find in your bottle
noNasties: Suitable for sensitive skin with care
Clear dose — not a secret blend
productCro.expertQuote: "Treating pigmentation in the Gulf requires a delicate balance. Aggressive peeling in a high-UV environment damages the skin. Skinouva's approach uses proven ingredients like Tranexamic and Azelaic acid to calmly and safely dismantle pigment, making it the perfect choice for consistent daily use."
